details: The agent ran appropriate search commands and correctly reported: (1) total count of 978, which satisfies the 'hundreds or thousands' requirement; (2) the 5 most recent issues with all three required fields — title, state (open/closed), and assignee status (all None, confirmed by absence of assignee field in raw API results). The agent properly used sort=created&order=desc to get the most recent issues and verified assignee data by reading the raw output file.
